restaurants.name: Silk Road Teahouse
restaurants.ambience: A charming café located in the historic center of Bukhara, popular with travelers looking for a quick and relaxed tea or coffee break
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Donuts & Coffee Bukhara
restaurants.ambience: A small café offering coffee, sandwiches, pastries, and quick snacks
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Aladdin, lounge cafe
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Old Bukhara Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A popular restaurant serving authentic Uzbek cuisine in a traditional courtyard setting, offering a charming local dining experience
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Chinar Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A cozy restaurant offering both Uzbek and international dishes with a relaxed and welcoming ambiance
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Chor Bakr Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A welcoming restaurant specializing in traditional Bukhara-style Uzbek dishes
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Kofexona
restaurants.ambience: A modern coffee spot with a casual setting popular among locals
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Old Street Coffee House
restaurants.ambience: A charming specialty coffee shop with excellent reviews and a calm atmosphere
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Ayvan Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A charming restaurant located near the historic Lyabi-Hauz complex, known for its elegant terrace dining and traditional Uzbek dishes with a modern touch
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Zaytoon Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A highly rated restaurant serving Uzbek and Mediterranean-inspired cuisine in a stylish setting. Popular among both locals and travelers
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Andara Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A cozy spot offering Uzbek and European dishes, perfect for a relaxed dinner after a day of sightseeing
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Chor Minor Madrasa
attractions.description: One of the most distinctive structures in Bukhara, Chor Minor literally means "Four Minarets." Built in the early 19th century, famous for its four turquoise domes
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Bolo Hauz Mosque
attractions.description: Located opposite the Ark Fortress, Bolo Hauz Mosque is known for its stunning wooden columns that reflect in the peaceful pool in front of the mosque
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Ark Fortress of Bukhara
attractions.description: One of the oldest structures in Bukhara. This massive fortress served as the royal residence of the Emirs of Bukhara for centuries
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Kalan Mosque (Kalyan Mosque)
attractions.description: One of the largest mosques in Central Asia and can accommodate over 10,000 worshippers. Its grand courtyard is an excellent example of Islamic architecture from the 16th century
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Kalyan Minaret
attractions.description: Standing at 46 meters tall, the Kalyan Minaret has been a defining feature of Bukhara's skyline since the 12th century
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Labi Hovuz
attractions.description: This picturesque square dates back to the 17th century and is surrounded by beautiful madrasas, teahouses, and restaurants
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

hotels._source_file: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx
